headline: PHINIA to Participate in Wells Fargo’s 16th Annual Industrials Conference
summary: AUBURN HILLS, Mich., May 27, 2026--PHINIA Inc. (NYSE: PHIN), a diversified, industrial supplier and global leader in the development of fuel systems, electrical systems and aftermarket solutions, announced today that it will participate in Wells Fargo’s 16th Annual Industrials Conference on Wednesday, June 10, 2026. Conference participation will be in-person and include a Q&A session to discuss dynamics across the various markets PHINIA serves around the world and the Company’s business.

headline: People Moves: Wells Fargo Hires Former Google AI Finance Leader
summary: In addition, IBD Arkadios hires a CFO with M&A background; Merit adds a CFO and a financial planning head; AC Family Office tees up Texas expansion; and Brighton Jones adds a Cleveland office.

headline: Jamie Dimon Says JPM Could Spend $20 Billion For An Acquisition: What Could Be The Targets?
summary: Jamie Dimon says JPMorgan could spend up to $20 billion on a deal, but a 1994 law blocks the obvious targets.
